message:
refactor: replace production unwrap() with let-else and expect

- crash.rs: is_crash_loop uses let-else instead of is_empty guard + unwrap
- mdl_extraction.rs: extract uses let-else instead of is_none check + unwrap
- mdl_extraction.rs: add_command/add_command_with_output use expect("just pushed")

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
